input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-eb3ce1616b6a4bc2842701bac1354634 && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:debug.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---DEBUG DONE---" && dotnet build -c Release /bl:release.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---RELEASE DONE---"

data.content:
Both builds succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors. The binlogs are created:

- **`debug.binlog`** — Debug configuration build
- **`release.binlog`** — Release configuration build

You can analyze them with `dotnet build` replay (`dotnet msbuild debug.binlog`) or tools like the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
